empty.heading: No accounts yet
empty.message: You don't have any accounts yet.

edit.title: Edit account
edit.openingBalanceHint: Changing the opening balance will adjust the current balance by the difference.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: This action is irreversible. Transactions will remain in history as read-only.

create.title: Add account
create.openingBalanceHint: In the MVP, the current balance starts from the opening balance.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Sum of balances for all PLN accounts.
summary.invalidSkipped: Some balances were skipped in the total.
summary.addToSeeSummary: Add an account to see the summary.

adjust.title: Set balance
adjust.description: This records a balance adjustment transaction (the delta needed to reach the new balance) and updates the current balance. Existing transactions are not modified.
adjust.confirmLabel: I understand this operation does not change transaction history.
adjust.confirmHint: Use only to correct the current balance.

delete.title: Delete account?
delete.description: The account will be removed from the list. Transactions will remain in history, but will be read-only.

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Please enter your new password below

brand.promise: Take back control of your household budget
brand.description: Import history, organize transactions, and track goals without spreadsheets.

benefits.budget: Budget and categories in one place

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address by clicking the link we just emailed to you.
verifyEmail.sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

brand.name: Ogarniam Portfel
brand.promise: Take back control of your household budget
brand.description: Accounts, transactions, imports, budgets, and goals in one organized place.

welcome.title: Take back control of your household budget
welcome.description: Bring accounts, transactions, imports, budgets, and goals into one place. See where money flows and what you can improve faster.

accounts.title: Accounts and balance
accounts.description: Organize accounts and keep a current money overview.

imports.title: History imports
imports.description: Upload statements and organize transactions faster.

goals.title: Budget and goals
goals.description: Plan spending, categories, and savings goals.

dashboard.title: Welcome to Ogarniam Portfel
dashboard.description: Start with accounts, history imports, or a manual transaction. This screen will grow with your data.

accounts.title: Add account
accounts.description: Set up an account and opening balance.

goals.title: Plan a goal
goals.description: Give your savings a clear direction.

errors.dateRange: The “From” date cannot be later than the “To” date.
errors.dateFormat: Enter a date in DD-MM-YYYY format.

empty.firstUse: You don't have any transactions yet.

a11y.showStatementDescription: Show statement data and full description

hints.title: Tips
hints.type: Choose “Income” or “Expense”. This affects the amount sign.
hints.amount: You can enter decimals. For expenses we'll store the amount as negative.
hints.description: A clear description makes it easier to find the transaction later.

transfer.bannerDescription: Amount and account are locked. Unlink the transfer first to change them.
transfer.accountHint: Account is locked while the transfer is linked. Use “Unlink transfer” to change it.
transfer.amountHint: Amount is locked while the transfer is linked. Use “Unlink transfer” to change it.

hints.title: Info
hints.scope: You're editing an existing transaction — changes will be reflected in history.
hints.amount: Double-check the amount sign (+/−). It affects the account balance.
hints.amountTransfer: Amount is locked while the transfer is linked. Use “Unlink transfer” to change it.
hints.save: After saving, you'll be taken back to the transactions list.

statement.title: Statement data
statement.description: Raw statement description from the bank (read-only).

form.advancedDatesHint: Optionally assign a booked date that differs from the operation date.
form.subject: Subject

unlink.title: Unlink transfer?
unlink.description: Both linked transactions will become a regular income and expense. Account balances will not change.

delete.title: Delete transaction?
delete.description: The transaction will be permanently deleted.
delete.descriptionTransfer: This is a transfer — deleting it removes both linked transactions.

toast.genericError: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

create.title: Transfer
create.description: Move funds between your own accounts. We'll create two linked transactions with the same date.
create.empty: To make a transfer, add at least two accounts.

form.hint: We'll save an expense on the source account and an income on the destination account.
form.sameAccountError: Choose a different destination account than the source account.
form.deletedNotice: This account is deleted — transfers are blocked.

banner.title: {count} possible transfers to confirm
banner.subtitle: We matched transaction pairs across accounts. Confirm the transfer or mark that it is not an internal transfer.

a11y.toggle: Transfer candidates, {count} pairs. Expand or collapse details.

a11y.reject: Mark as not a transfer from {from} to {to}

toast.genericError: We couldn't make the transfer. Please try again.

dialog.title: Import transactions
dialog.contextEmpty: Select an account to start the import.

account.label: Account
account.hint: The import bank is derived from the account.

file.label: File
file.title: Upload a file
file.description: Upload a CSV or XLSX file with column headers.

a11y.dropzone: File upload. Press Enter or Space to choose a file, or drag and drop here.

warning.title: Warning
warning.dedupe: Duplicates will be skipped (duplicate = raw description + date + amount + account).
warning.after: After importing, we'll show only the newly added transactions.

processing.title: Import in progress…
processing.hint: This may take a few minutes. You can close this window — the import will continue in the background.
processing.progress: Imported {imported} of {total}. Duplicates skipped: {duplicates}. Failed rows: {failed}.
processing.longRunning: The import is still running. You can refresh the status.

validation.fileType: Unsupported file format. Upload a CSV or XLSX.
validation.cashBlocked: File import is not available for cash accounts.
validation.generic: We couldn't upload the file. Please try again.

toast.startFailed: We couldn't start the import. Please try again.
toast.unrecognizedHeaders: We couldn't recognize the file headers for the selected bank.

result.allDuplicates: We didn't find any new transactions. All rows were duplicates.
result.validationHint: If some rows failed, check date formats (DD-MM-YYYY or ISO) and amounts (e.g. 123.45).

banner.title: {count} import rows were not added
banner.subtitle: Your balance may not match the bank statement. Add missing transactions manually or mark as resolved.

a11y.toggle: Import failed rows, {count} rows. Expand or collapse details.

modal.title: Failed rows from file
modal.hint: These rows did not affect your balance. Add them manually or check the source file.
modal.more_on_transactions: and {count} more — see the full list on the transactions page.

a11y.toggle: Failed rows from file. Expand or collapse details.

a11y.dismissAll: Mark all {count} import failed rows as resolved

reasons.missing_fields: Missing required fields (date, amount, or description)

fields.previewHint: Pick a color to see the preview

delete.title: Delete category?
delete.description: The category will be permanently removed. Categories used in transactions cannot be deleted.

archive.title: Archive goal?
archive.description: The goal will be hidden from the active list and monthly budget. You can restore it later from the archived filter.

unarchive.title: Restore goal?
unarchive.description: The goal will return to the active list and monthly budget.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.heading: Profile information
profile.description: Update your name and email address

verification.resend: Click here to re-send the verification email.
verification.sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Password settings
password.heading: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

deleteAccount.heading: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.dialogTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.dialogDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
